actions.name: check
actions.description: Analyze the current package and report errors, but don't build object files

actions.name: doc
actions.description: Build this package's and its dependencies' documentation

actions.name: init
actions.description: Create a new cargo package in an existing directory

actions.name: add
actions.description: Add dependencies to a manifest file

actions.name: remove
actions.description: Remove dependencies from a manifest file

actions.name: run
actions.description: Run a binary or example of the local package

actions.name: publish
actions.description: Package and upload this package to the registry

arguments.description: Provide a detailed explanation of a rustc error message
Use verbose output (-vv very verbose/build.rs output)
Do not print cargo log messages
Change to DIRECTORY before doing anything (nightly-only)

cargo.rawToml:
[tool]
name = "cargo"
description = "Rust's package manager"
installed_name = "cargo"
[[actions]]
name = "build"
description = "Compile the current package"
[[actions]]
name = "check"
description = "Analyze the current package and report errors, but don't build object files"
[[actions]]
name = "clean"
description = "Remove the target directory"
[[actions]]
name = "doc"
description = "Build this package's and its dependencies' documentation"
[[actions]]
name = "new"
description = "Create a new cargo package"
[[actions]]
name = "init"
description = "Create a new cargo package in an existing directory"
[[actions]]
name = "add"
description = "Add dependencies to a manifest file"
[[actions]]
name = "remove"
description = "Remove dependencies from a manifest file"
[[actions]]
name = "run"
description = "Run a binary or example of the local package"
[[actions]]
name = "test"
description = "Run the tests"
[[actions]]
name = "bench"
description = "Run the benchmarks"
[[actions]]
name = "update"
description = "Update dependencies listed in Cargo.lock"
[[actions]]
name = "search"
description = "Search registry for crates"
[[actions]]
name = "publish"
description = "Package and upload this package to the registry"
[[actions]]
name = "install"
description = "Install a Rust binary"
[[actions]]
name = "uninstall"
description = "Uninstall a Rust binary"
[[arguments]]
flag = "V"
description = "Print version info and exit"
type = "boolean"
long = "version"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "List installed commands"
type = "boolean"
long = "list"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Provide a detailed explanation of a rustc error message"
type = "string"
long = "explain"
[[arguments]]
flag = "v"
description = "Use verbose output (-vv very verbose/build.rs output)"
type = "boolean"
long = "verbose"
[[arguments]]
flag = "q"
description = "Do not print cargo log messages"
type = "boolean"
long = "quiet"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Coloring [possible values: auto, always, never]"
type = "string"
long = "color"
[[arguments]]
flag = "C"
description = "Change to DIRECTORY before doing anything (nightly-only)"
type = "string"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Assert that `Cargo.lock` will remain unchanged"
type = "boolean"
long = "locked"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Run without accessing the network"
type = "boolean"
long = "offline"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Equivalent to specifying both --locked and --offline"
type = "boolean"
long = "frozen"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Override a configuration value"
type = "string"
long = "config"
[[arguments]]
flag = "Z"
description = "Unstable (nightly-only) flags to Cargo"
type = "string"
[[arguments]]
flag = "h"
description = "Print help"
type = "boolean"
long = "help"
[[tags]]
name = "package-manager"
color = "#E8175D"
[[tags]]
name = "rust"
color = "#7A7A7A"

tool.name: dotnet
tool.description: Execute a .NET application or SDK command.
tool.notes: Can be used as both a runtime executor for .dll files and as an SDK command-line tool.

actions.name: clean
actions.description: Clean build outputs of a .NET project.

actions.name: format
actions.description: Apply style preferences to a project or solution.

actions.name: help
actions.description: Opens the reference page in a browser for the specified command.

actions.name: new
actions.description: Create a new .NET project or file.

actions.name: package
actions.description: Search for, add, remove, or list PackageReferences for a .NET project.

actions.name: restore
actions.description: Restore dependencies specified in a .NET project.

actions.name: run
actions.description: Build and run a .NET project output.

actions.name: test
actions.description: Run unit tests using the test runner specified in a .NET project.

actions.name: tool
actions.description: Install or manage tools that extend the .NET experience.

actions.name: watch
actions.description: Start a file watcher that runs a command when files change.

arguments.description: Path containing probing policy and assemblies to probe for.
Version of the installed Shared Framework to use to run the application.
Roll forward to framework version (LatestPatch, Minor, LatestMinor, Major, LatestMajor, Disable).

dotnet.rawToml:
[tool]
name = "dotnet"
description = "Execute a .NET application or SDK command."
notes = "Can be used as both a runtime executor for .dll files and as an SDK command-line tool."
installed_name = "dotnet"
[[actions]]
name = "build"
description = "Build a .NET project."
[[actions]]
name = "clean"
description = "Clean build outputs of a .NET project."
[[actions]]
name = "format"
description = "Apply style preferences to a project or solution."
[[actions]]
name = "help"
description = "Opens the reference page in a browser for the specified command."
[[actions]]
name = "msbuild"
description = "Run Microsoft Build Engine (MSBuild) commands."
[[actions]]
name = "new"
description = "Create a new .NET project or file."
[[actions]]
name = "nuget"
description = "Provides additional NuGet commands."
[[actions]]
name = "pack"
description = "Create a NuGet package."
[[actions]]
name = "package"
description = "Search for, add, remove, or list PackageReferences for a .NET project."
[[actions]]
name = "publish"
description = "Publish a .NET project for deployment."
[[actions]]
name = "restore"
description = "Restore dependencies specified in a .NET project."
[[actions]]
name = "run"
description = "Build and run a .NET project output."
[[actions]]
name = "sdk"
description = "Manage .NET SDK installation."
[[actions]]
name = "test"
description = "Run unit tests using the test runner specified in a .NET project."
[[actions]]
name = "tool"
description = "Install or manage tools that extend the .NET experience."
[[actions]]
name = "watch"
description = "Start a file watcher that runs a command when files change."
[[arguments]]
flag = "d"
description = "Enable diagnostic output."
type = "boolean"
long = "diagnostics"
[[arguments]]
flag = "h"
description = "Show command line help."
type = "boolean"
long = "help"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Display .NET information."
type = "boolean"
long = "info"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Display the installed runtimes."
type = "boolean"
long = "list-runtimes"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Display the installed SDKs."
type = "boolean"
long = "list-sdks"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Display .NET SDK version in use."
type = "boolean"
long = "version"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Path containing probing policy and assemblies to probe for."
type = "string"
long = "additionalprobingpath"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Path to additional deps.json file."
type = "string"
long = "additional-deps"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Path to <application>.deps.json file."
type = "string"
long = "depsfile"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Version of the installed Shared Framework to use to run the application."
type = "string"
long = "fx-version"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Roll forward to framework version (LatestPatch, Minor, LatestMinor, Major, LatestMajor, Disable)."
type = "string"
long = "roll-forward"
[[arguments]]
flag = ""
description = "Path to <application>.runtimeconfig.json file."
type = "string"
long = "runtimeconfig"
[[parameters]]
name = "path-to-application"
type = "string"
required = false
[[tags]]
name = "dotnet"
color = "#512BD4"
[[tags]]
name = "sdk"
color = "#7A7A7A"
[[tags]]
name = "runtime"
color = "#7A7A7A"

tool.name: gpg
tool.description: Sign, check, encrypt or decrypt data
tool.notes: Default operation depends on the input data

arguments.description: use USER-ID to sign or decrypt
set compress level to N (0 disables)

git.rawToml:
[tool]
name = "gpg"
description = "Sign, check, encrypt or decrypt data"
notes = "Default operation depends on the input data"
executable_path = ""
installed_name = "gpg"

[[actions]]
name = "sign"
description = "make a signature"

  [[actions.arguments]]
  flag = "s"
  long = "sign"
  description = "make a signature"
  type = "boolean"
  value_style = "none"

[[actions]]
name = "encrypt"
description = "encrypt data"

  [[actions.arguments]]
  flag = "e"
  long = "encrypt"
  description = "encrypt data"
  type = "boolean"
  value_style = "none"

[[actions]]
name = "decrypt"
description = "decrypt data (default)"

  [[actions.arguments]]
  flag = "d"
  long = "decrypt"
  description = "decrypt data"
  type = "boolean"
  value_style = "none"

[[actions]]
name = "list-keys"
description = "list keys"

  [[actions.arguments]]
  flag = "k"
  long = "list-keys"
  description = "list keys"
  type = "boolean"
  value_style = "none"

[[actions]]
name = "generate-key"
description = "generate a new key pair"

  [[actions.arguments]]
  flag = ""
  long = "generate-key"
  description = "generate a new key pair"
  type = "boolean"
  value_style = "none"

[[actions]]
name = "import"
description = "import/merge keys"

  [[actions.arguments]]
  flag = ""
  long = "import"
  description = "import/merge keys"
  type = "boolean"
  value_style = "none"

[[actions]]
name = "export"
description = "export keys"

  [[actions.arguments]]
  flag = ""
  long = "export"
  description = "export keys"
  type = "boolean"
  value_style = "none"

[[actions.parameters]]
name = "files"
type = "string"
required = false

[[arguments]]
flag = "v"
long = "verbose"
description = "verbose"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "q"
long = "quiet"
description = "be somewhat more quiet"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "a"
long = "armor"
description = "create ascii armored output"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "o"
long = "output"
description = "write output to FILE"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[arguments]]
flag = "r"
long = "recipient"
description = "encrypt for USER-ID"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[arguments]]
flag = "u"
long = "local-user"
description = "use USER-ID to sign or decrypt"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[arguments]]
flag = "z"
long = ""
description = "set compress level to N (0 disables)"
type = "integer"
value_style = "space"

[[tags]]
name = "encryption"
color = "#7A7A7A"

[[tags]]
name = "security"
color = "#7A7A7A"

[[tags]]
name = "cryptography"
color = "#7A7A7A"

tool.name: pnpm
tool.description: Performant, disk space efficient package manager
tool.notes: Use 'pnpm help -a' to list all commands

actions.name: add
actions.description: Installs a package and any packages that it depends on

actions.name: install
actions.description: Install all dependencies for a project

actions.name: link
actions.description: Connect the local project to another one

actions.name: remove
actions.description: Removes packages from node_modules and from the project's package.json

actions.name: unlink
actions.description: Unlinks a package and re-installs the dependency

actions.name: update
actions.description: Updates packages to their latest version based on the specified range

actions.name: audit
actions.description: Checks for known security issues with the installed packages

actions.name: list
actions.description: Print all the versions of packages that are installed in a tree-structure

actions.name: why
actions.description: Shows all packages that depend on the specified package

actions.name: create
actions.description: Create a project from a starter kit

actions.name: dlx
actions.description: Fetches a package from the registry and runs its default command binary

actions.name: exec
actions.description: Executes a shell command in scope of a project

actions.name: publish
actions.description: Publishes a package to the registry

actions.name: self-update
actions.description: Updates pnpm to the latest version

arguments.description: Run the command for each project in the workspace

pnpm.rawToml:
[tool]
name = "pnpm"
description = "Performant, disk space efficient package manager"
notes = "Use 'pnpm help -a' to list all commands"
installed_name = "pnpm"
[[actions]]
name = "add"
description = "Installs a package and any packages that it depends on"
[[actions]]
name = "install"
description = "Install all dependencies for a project"
[[actions]]
name = "link"
description = "Connect the local project to another one"
[[actions]]
name = "remove"
description = "Removes packages from node_modules and from the project's package.json"
[[actions]]
name = "unlink"
description = "Unlinks a package and re-installs the dependency"
[[actions]]
name = "update"
description = "Updates packages to their latest version based on the specified range"
[[actions]]
name = "audit"
description = "Checks for known security issues with the installed packages"
[[actions]]
name = "list"
description = "Print all the versions of packages that are installed in a tree-structure"
[[actions]]
name = "outdated"
description = "Check for outdated packages"
[[actions]]
name = "why"
description = "Shows all packages that depend on the specified package"
[[actions]]
name = "create"
description = "Create a project from a starter kit"
[[actions]]
name = "dlx"
description = "Fetches a package from the registry and runs its default command binary"
[[actions]]
name = "exec"
description = "Executes a shell command in scope of a project"
[[actions]]
name = "run"
description = "Runs a defined package script"
[[actions]]
name = "config"
description = "Manage the pnpm configuration files"
[[actions]]
name = "init"
description = "Create a package.json file"
[[actions]]
name = "publish"
description = "Publishes a package to the registry"
[[actions]]
name = "self-update"
description = "Updates pnpm to the latest version"
[[arguments]]
flag = "r"
description = "Run the command for each project in the workspace"
type = "boolean"
long = "recursive"
[[tags]]
name = "package-manager"
color = "#E8175D"
[[tags]]
name = "nodejs"
color = "#7A7A7A"

arguments.description: issue warnings about converting bytes/bytearray to str
print this help message and exit
isolate Python from the user's environment
run library module as a script
do -O changes and also discard docstrings
don't prepend a potentially unsafe path to sys.path
don't print version and copyright messages on interactive startup
don't add user site directory to sys.path
force the stdout and stderr streams to be unbuffered
print the Python version number and exit
control how Python invalidates hash-based .pyc files
print help about Python environment variables and exit
print help about implementation-specific -X options and exit
print complete help information and exit
arguments.name: arg

python.rawToml:
[tool]
name = "python"
description = "The Python interpreter"
notes = ""
executable_path = ""
installed_name = "python"

[[arguments]]
flag = "b"
long = ""
description = "issue warnings about converting bytes/bytearray to str"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "B"
long = ""
description = "don't write .pyc files on import"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "c"
long = ""
description = "program passed in as string"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[arguments]]
flag = "d"
long = ""
description = "turn on parser debugging output"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "E"
long = ""
description = "ignore PYTHON* environment variables"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "h"
long = "help"
description = "print this help message and exit"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "i"
long = ""
description = "inspect interactively after running script"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "I"
long = ""
description = "isolate Python from the user's environment"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "m"
long = ""
description = "run library module as a script"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[arguments]]
flag = "O"
long = ""
description = "remove assert and __debug__-dependent statements"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "OO"
long = ""
description = "do -O changes and also discard docstrings"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "P"
long = ""
description = "don't prepend a potentially unsafe path to sys.path"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "q"
long = ""
description = "don't print version and copyright messages on interactive startup"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "s"
long = ""
description = "don't add user site directory to sys.path"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "S"
long = ""
description = "don't imply 'import site' on initialization"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "u"
long = ""
description = "force the stdout and stderr streams to be unbuffered"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "v"
long = ""
description = "verbose (trace import statements)"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "V"
long = "version"
description = "print the Python version number and exit"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "W"
long = ""
description = "warning control; arg is action:message:category:module:lineno"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[arguments]]
flag = "x"
long = ""
description = "skip first line of source"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "X"
long = ""
description = "set implementation-specific option"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[arguments]]
flag = ""
long = "check-hash-based-pycs"
description = "control how Python invalidates hash-based .pyc files"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[arguments]]
flag = ""
long = "help-env"
description = "print help about Python environment variables and exit"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = ""
long = "help-xoptions"
description = "print help about implementation-specific -X options and exit"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = ""
long = "help-all"
description = "print complete help information and exit"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[parameters]]
name = "file"
type = "string"
required = false

[[parameters]]
name = "arg"
type = "string"
required = false

[[tags]]
name = "programming-language"
color = "#7A7A7A"

[[tags]]
name = "interpreter"
color = "#7A7A7A"

tool.name: node
tool.description: JavaScript runtime built on Chrome's V8 engine

arguments.description: always enter the REPL even if stdin does not appear to be a terminal

node.rawToml:
[tool]
name = "node"
description = "JavaScript runtime built on Chrome's V8 engine"
notes = ""
executable_path = ""
installed_name = "node"

[[actions]]
name = "inspect"
description = "Activate the inspector for debugging"

  [[actions.parameters]]
  name = "script"
  type = "string"
  required = false

[[arguments]]
flag = "c"
long = "check"
description = "syntax check script without executing"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "e"
long = "eval"
description = "evaluate script"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[arguments]]
flag = "i"
long = "interactive"
description = "always enter the REPL even if stdin does not appear to be a terminal"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "p"
long = "print"
description = "evaluate script and print result"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[arguments]]
flag = "r"
long = "require"
description = "CommonJS module to preload"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[arguments]]
flag = "v"
long = "version"
description = "print Node.js version"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = "h"
long = "help"
description = "print node command line options"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = ""
long = "watch"
description = "run in watch mode"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = ""
long = "test"
description = "launch test runner on startup"
type = "boolean"
value_style = "none"

[[arguments]]
flag = ""
long = "import"
description = "ES module to preload"
type = "string"
value_style = "space"

[[parameters]]
name = "script.js"
type = "string"
required = false

[[tags]]
name = "runtime"
color = "#7A7A7A"

[[tags]]
name = "javascript"
color = "#7A7A7A"

actions.name: run
actions.description: Create and run a new container from an image

actions.name: exec
actions.description: Execute a command in a running container

actions.name: build
actions.description: Build an image from a Dockerfile

actions.name: pull
actions.description: Download an image from a registry

actions.name: push
actions.description: Upload an image to a registry

actions.name: inspect
actions.description: Return low-level information on Docker objects

arguments.description: Name of the context to use to connect to the daemon
Use TLS and verify the remote

docker.rawToml:
[tool]
name = "docker"
description = "A self-sufficient runtime for containers"
notes = ""
executable_path = ""
installed_name = "docker"

[[actions]]
name = "run"
description = "Create and run a new container from an image"

[[actions]]
name = "exec"
description = "Execute a command in a running container"

[[actions]]
name = "ps"
description = "List containers"

[[actions]]
name = "build"
description = "Build an image from a Dockerfile"

[[actions]]
name = "pull"
description = "Download an image from a registry"

[[actions]]
name = "push"

[[actions]]
name = "images"

[[actions]]
name = "login"

[[actions]]
name = "logout"

[[actions]]
name = "search"

[[actions]]
name = "version"

[[actions]]
name = "info"

name = "container"

[[actions]]
name = "network"

[[actions]]
name = "volume"

[[actions]]
name = "compose"

[[actions]]
name = "system"

[[actions]]
name = "swarm"

[[actions]]
name = "inspect"

[[arguments]]

value_style = "space"

value_style = "none"

long = "tlsverify"

long = "version"

value_style = "none"

[[tags]]

tool.name: Clone-Index.py
tool.description: Clone or update the crates.io index, then optionally download crates.
